clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.

The Service Provider shall perform the web design services described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] for [PROJECT_NAME], covering [NUMBER_OF_PAGES] pages. Hosting, domain registration, and content management system setup are outside the scope of this Agreement unless separately agreed in writing.
The Service Provider shall deliver the Deliverables to the Client on or before [DELIVERY_DATE].
The Services shall take place on [DELIVERY_DATE] at , subject to any change confirmed in writing by both Parties.
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.

Where the Services include an interactive prototype, the Service Provider shall deliver it using [PROTOTYPE_TOOL], covering the flows described in [PROTOTYPE_SCOPE]. The prototype is a design demonstration and is not the final coded website.
Pages requested beyond [NUMBER_OF_PAGES] shall be charged at [ADDITIONAL_PAGE_FEE] per page.
The Client may request delivery within [RUSH_DELIVERY_PERIOD_DAYS] days, in exchange for an additional fee of [RUSH_DELIVERY_FEE].

Where the Client requests developer handoff support, the Service Provider shall provide up to [DEVELOPER_SUPPORT_HOURS] hours of assistance at [DEVELOPER_SUPPORT_RATE] per hour beyond that allotment. The Service Provider bears no responsibility for the correctness of the implemented code.
Editable source files for the Deliverables shall be provided to the Client only where [SOURCE_FILES_INCLUDED] indicates inclusion, or upon payment of an additional fee of [SOURCE_FILES_FEE].

The Client may grant the Service Provider a non-exclusive right to display the Deliverables for the Service Provider's professional portfolio and promotional purposes. This right does not apply where the Confidentiality Clause designates the Deliverables as confidential, or where [PORTFOLIO_AUTHORIZATION_DECLINED] indicates the Client has declined.
The Client shall review each deliverable within [APPROVAL_PERIOD_DAYS] days. If the Client does not respond within this period, the deliverable shall be deemed approved.
The Client may request up to [INCLUDED_REVISION_ROUNDS] rounds of revisions at no additional charge. Additional rounds shall be charged at [ADDITIONAL_REVISION_FEE] per round.
The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables. Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a [LICENSE_SCOPE] license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].
Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a license to deploy and use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
